# Sunra.ai Developer Documentation

Sunra.ai is a generative media platform built for developers, providing high-performance AI model inference capabilities.
It specializes in running diffusion models through production-ready APIs and interactive UI playgrounds.

## Models

Sunra.ai offers a wide range of models, including:

- [black-forest-labs/flux.1-redux-dev/image-to-image](https://sunra.ai/models/black-forest-labs/flux.1-redux-dev/image-to-image/llms.txt)
- [black-forest-labs/flux.1-fill-pro/image-to-image](https://sunra.ai/models/black-forest-labs/flux.1-fill-pro/image-to-image/llms.txt)
- [black-forest-labs/flux.1-depth-pro/image-to-image](https://sunra.ai/models/black-forest-labs/flux.1-depth-pro/image-to-image/llms.txt)
- [black-forest-labs/flux.1-depth-dev/image-to-image](https://sunra.ai/models/black-forest-labs/flux.1-depth-dev/image-to-image/llms.txt)
- [black-forest-labs/flux.1-canny-pro/image-to-image](https://sunra.ai/models/black-forest-labs/flux.1-canny-pro/image-to-image/llms.txt)
- [black-forest-labs/flux.1-canny-dev/image-to-image](https://sunra.ai/models/black-forest-labs/flux.1-canny-dev/image-to-image/llms.txt)
- [black-forest-labs/flux-kontext-dev/image-to-image](https://sunra.ai/models/black-forest-labs/flux-kontext-dev/image-to-image/llms.txt)
- [black-forest-labs/flux-1.1-pro-ultra/text-to-image](https://sunra.ai/models/black-forest-labs/flux-1.1-pro-ultra/text-to-image/llms.txt)
